uuidGenerator.uuidv4Desc: UUID v4: 128-bit random identifier (RFC 9562). Uses crypto.randomUUID().
uuidGenerator.uuidv7Desc: UUID v7: Time-ordered UUID (RFC 9562). 48-bit Unix timestamp (ms) + random. Sortable by creation time.
uuidGenerator.ulidDesc: ULID: Universally Unique Lexicographically Sortable Identifier. 48-bit timestamp + 80-bit random.
uuidGenerator.nanoidDesc: nanoid: Compact URL-friendly unique ID. 21 characters, ~126 bits of entropy.
